source_title: 02 Building Environments - The Basics/06 Creating the Ceiling Master Material

evidences.content: 因此，如果我们看一下我们的场景，就会发现这些反射式发射灯光是 So if we take a look at our scene, we have these reflective emissive lights that are 在整个天花板上都有。 grouped across the entire ceiling. 我们可以看到，它们一直都是一个完美的网格，如果它们是克隆的 We can see here that they're a perfect grid all the way down, which if they're cloned 这意味着我们可以对它们进行实例化。 in the same objects, that means we can instance them. 但是，如果我们要把这些东西一个一个地拖到整个天花板上、 But if we were going to try to drag these out one by one by one across our entire ceiling, 这需要很长的时间。 it's going to take a really long time. 因此，我认为这是一个尝试用蓝图复制这些东西的好机会。 So I think this is a good opportunity to try to replicate these using blueprints. 因此，如果您进入 UE VFX 文件夹，转到 assets（资产），然后转到 ceiling tiles（天花板瓦片），我准备了这个真正的 So if you go to the UE VFX folder, go to assets and then ceiling tiles, I prepared this really 质地简单。 simple texture. 它只是一个白色的纹理，上面有一些破碎的信息和一个黑色的 It's just a white texture with a little bit of broken up information on it and a black 边缘，就像我们的参照物一样。 edge, just like our references. 我们将用它来制作天花板瓷砖。 And we're going to use this to create our ceiling tiles. 首先，创建一个立方体并将其拖入场景中。 So first things first, let's create a cube and drag it into our scene. 因此，让我们为这个立方体制作一个材质，并将其命名为 MM 底纹天花板瓷砖 01。 So let's make a material for this cube and let's call it MM underscore ceiling tile 01. 让我们在这里创建一个非常简单的主素材。 And let's create a very simple master material here. 因此，如果我们将纹理拖入场景，就会自动创建一个 So if we take our texture and we drag it into our scene, that'll automatically create a 材料图中的纹理样本。 texture sample inside of our material graph. 我们在这里要做的主要事情就是让它发射出去。 And the main things we want to do here is make this emissive. 因此，我要将 RGB 插入发射颜色，并将其插入 So I'm going to plug our RGB into the emissive color, and I'm also going to plug it into 基色。 the base color. 现在，如果我们保存了它，如果你正在编辑母版素材，并想看到它的更新情况 Now if we save that, and if you're editing a master material and you want to see it update 在你的场景中，你必须要么保存它，要么每次都点击应用，这是另一个 in your scene, you have to either save it or hit apply every single time, which is another 材料实例之所以好，是因为您不一定需要将它们保存到 reason why material instances are nice because you don't necessarily need to save them to 查看您的更改。 see your changes. 现在，让我们将主材质拖到我们的对象上，然后 But now let's take our master material and we can drag it onto our object here and we 能看得很清楚。 can see great. 现在，我们在边角处设置了黑边。 Now we have black edges on the corners. 如果我们把它作为一个立方体预览，就会看到和这里一模一样的效果。 And if we preview this as a cube, we'll see the same exact thing over here. 因此，我要添加的一点是，我要从我们的纹理样本中拖拽出来。 So one thing I'm going to add is I'm going to drag off of our texture sample. 当你看到这里时，你会看到所有这些不同的菜单，看起来就像 And when you look here, you're going to see all these different menus and it seems like 太多了 there's so many. 再说一遍，我们最终只会使用其中的几个。 Again, at the end of the day, there's only a couple that we're going to use. 因此，我一定会指出所有最常用的方法。 So I'll make sure to point out all of the ones that are most commonly used. 其中很多只是简单的数学节点，如乘法、减法、加法或除法。 And a lot of them are just simple math nodes like multiply, subtract, add, or divide. 因此，在这种情况下，我要将其乘以 2，然后按应用键。 So in this case, I'm going to multiply this by two and we press apply. 所以我要做的一件事，就是暂时隐藏光源。 So one thing I'm going to do, let me just hide our light source for now. 而且它还能让这个立方体发光。 And it'll actually make this cube emissive. 所以它是发射型的，因为我们的场景启用了流明，而流明是灯光的投射物 So it's emissive because our scene has lumen enabled and lumen is what casts the lights 并在场景周围呈现出非常漂亮的倒影。 and gives us these really nice reflections around our scene. 你可以看到，如果我们把它放在水坑中，它甚至会出现在水坑的反光中。 You can see that it will even appear in the reflections of the puddle if we place it in 正确的地方。 the right place. 因此，我们在这里得到了很好的反射。 So we get a nice reflection there. 现在，如果我将其设置为 0.2 这样的值，我们就能让它变得更暗，因为我们在乘以 And now if I set this to something like 0.2, we'll make it darker because we're multiplying 它的数值要低得多。 it by a value that's much lower. 你可以看到它对亮度的直接影响，以及有多少光线投射到 And you can see it as a direct effect on the brightness and how much light is cast into 我们的场景。 our scene. 同样，这是我们的主素材，是我们正在创建的模板。 So again, this is our master material, the template that we're creating. 如果您想使用主材料并从中创建材料实例，您只需 If you want to take a master material and create a material instance from it, all you 要做的就是右键单击主材质，然后点击创建材质实例。 have to do is right click a master material and hit create material instance. 默认情况下，它会在节点末尾添加下划线 INST。 By default, it'll add underscore INST to the end of your node. 但是，如果我们想保留命名惯例，我们就把材料实例中的 M 换成 MI。 But if we want to keep our naming convention, we'll swap out M for MI for material instance. 然后打开并点击保存。 And then let's open that up and hit save. 你可以看到，这里没有任何设置。 And you can see here, we don't have any settings. 这些只是询问我们的母体材料是什么，但实际上我们并没有任何 These are just asking what our parent material is, but we don't actually have anything that 我们可以像处理 Quixel 母版素材那样在这里进行编辑。 we can edit in here like we did with our Quixel master materials. 因此，我们需要设置一些基本参数，以便它们显示在我们的素材中 So we need to set up some basic parameters so that they'll show up inside of our material 实例，这样我们就可以对其进行即时编辑。 instance so that we can edit it on the fly. 因此，我们只需将这个材质实例应用到这个立方体，但要确保点击 So let's just apply this material instance to this cube, but let's make sure to click 因为这就是我们要编辑的母版材料。 our master material because that's what we want to edit. 因此，如果我们需要查看，每个材料实例都有一个父实例，您只需双击 So if we need to see that, every material instance has a parent and you can just double 点击它，就能打开它所基于的模板。 click that to open up the template that it's based off of. 因此，如果我们想创建一个亮度设置，就必须创建一个 So if we wanted to create a brightness setting, what we have to do is we have to create a 因此，我们可以把这个拖走，然后输入参数，它会给我们提供大量不同的选项 So we can drag this off and type in parameter and it'll give us a ton of different options 但最常见的是标量参数，我们可以输入亮度。 here, but the most common ones are scalar parameters and we can type in brightness. 标量参数只是一个数字，具体来说是一个浮点数。 And a scalar parameter is just a number and specifically it's a floating point number. 浮点数的意思是，它后面有一个小数点，而整数是 All that floating point means is that it has a decimal afterwards, whereas an integer is 没有小数点的东西。 a thing where you don't have any decimals. 因此，这一点稍后就会发挥作用，但你现在需要知道的是，它是 So this will come into play in a bit, but all you need to know for now is that it's 是一个标量参数。 a scalar parameter. 标量指一个数字。 Scalar means one number. 因此，如果你用任何东西乘以 1，它就会变成它自己。 So if you multiply anything by one, it'll just be itself. 默认设置为 1，然后点击保存。 So let's set this to one by default and let's hit save. 现在，让我们回到我们的材料实例，现在我们将有这个亮度全局 And now let's go back to our material instance and now we'll have this brightness global 我们可以调整的标量参数。 scalar parameter that we can adjust. 因此，现在我们可以上下拖动它，我们可以看到，现在我已经把它变成了一千个 So now we can drag this up or down and we can see that now that I've made it a thousand 亮了几倍，投射到我们场景中的光线也更多了。 times brighter, it's casting a lot more light into our scene. 当您使用这些非常极端的数值时，流明就会开始中断。 When you do these very extreme values, it will start to break lumen. 所以，一定要意识到这一点。 So just be conscious of that. 所以，让我们把它设回 10，而不是 100，你就可以看到，好吧，是的，它是 So let's set it back down to 10 instead of a hundred and you can see, okay, yeah, it's 在我们的场景中会有很大的不同，我们也可以将其设置为 making a pretty big difference inside of our scene and we could also set it at something 低，如 0.1。 low like 0.1. 所以这是一个标量参数。 So that's a scalar parameter. 只是向上或向下。 It's just up or down. 如果我们右击这里，另一种类型的参数将是矢量参数。 The other type of parameter, if we right click here, is going to be a vector parameter. 因此，矢量参数不是一个值，而是三个值。 So a vector parameter is instead of one value, we get three. 将矢量视为 R、G 和 B 图像（三个矢量，RGB）是不错的选择。 It's nice to think of a vector as an R, G and B image, three vectors, RGB. 它有四个选项，现在让我们把默认值设为 1。 It has the option of being four and now let's set our default value to one. 所以，我们要把这个值拖到 1。 So we'll drag this value up to one. 现在，如果我们按下 "保存 "键，材料实例中就会出现一个新参数。 Now if we press save here, we'll get a new parameter in our material instance. 因此，亮度将消失，取而代之的是颜色，因为现在亮度 So brightness will now be gone and it'll be replaced by color because now the brightness 不是连接，而是颜色。 isn't connected, the color is. 现在，我们有了一个颜色参数，可以开始将其调成任何颜色，然后 So now we have a color parameter and now we can start to tint this into any color and 您可以看到它也会对我们的场景产生同样的效果。 you can see it will also have the same effect on our scene. 一旦流明达到我们的要求，它就会在我们的场景中投射出不同颜色的光。 It'll cast a different color light into our scene once lumen catches up with how we've 改变了它。 changed it. 具体来说，R、G 和 B 这三个数字正在 And specifically what's happening is this R, G and B, these three numbers are being 乘以该图像的三个 RGB 值。 multiplied by this image's three RGB values. 如果对矢量进行去饱和化处理，其效果与单浮点运算相同。 And if you desaturate a vector, it'll act the same way as our single floating point 标量数。 scalar number. 然后将数值滑块向上或向下滑动。 And then you just bring the value slider up or down. 不过，我们还是把它设回 1，然后开始构建我们的蓝图吧。 But let's just set this back to one and start building our blueprint.
evidences.speaker: instructor
